scenario: 典型场景：用 DeepSeek 确认的项目差距分析（全7 Phase引擎）
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with deepseek — focus on security
expect: skill: 1) resolve verifier → 2) sanity-check → 3) pin target → 4) run Workflow(7 phases: PreScan→Map→Probe→Confirm(converge)→Synthesize→Critic→Write) → 5) report: confirmed/SUSPECT gaps + confidence + lens + P0-P3 + passes + critic + artifact path + 标注 confirm 模型

scenario: 边界场景：verifier 模型未配置
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles — I haven't run /pantheon-model yet
expect: skill: 检测到无 config.json → 告知先运行 /pantheon-model → 或提供 Claude default → 不启动 Workflow

scenario: 歧义场景：没说项目路径也没说模型
prompt: do a gap analysis on my project
expect: skill: 追问 1) 哪个项目/路径？2) 用哪个模型？→ 不盲目启动 Workflow

scenario: 引擎验证：steelman + confidence + lens + SUSPECT + convergence
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with claude — dimensions security,testing
expect: JS引擎: 1) PreScan grep findings → 2) steelman+confidence+lens verdicts → 3) SUSPECT分离(conf<0.8) → 4) convergence(passes≥1) → 5) Critic self-verify → 6) Write artifact to .gaps/

scenario: 新引擎特性：Critic自检 + 收敛循环 + 产物写入
prompt: full gap analysis on f:/ClaudeFiles with qwen verifier
expect: JS引擎: 1) PreScan→Map→Probe→Confirm(converge)→Synthesize→Critic→Write 完整7Phase 2) Critic验证report质量 3) .gaps/ 产物写入 4) passes≥1 5) TRUNCATED AT 安全网(如果context耗尽)
